name: itu-giga-kp
description: Production kit for the FiscalAdmin OU — ITU/Giga Knowledge Products contract (RFQ-S-GIGA-2026-022, PO #334304): author a KP video-script bundle in the locked audience register, verify every PAERA citation against the source, run the ITU compliance QA gate, and build/render the docx reliably. One author skill plus three gate/mechanic skills, modelled on the RA-to-RFP kit.
